title: NASA Awards Contract for Cybersecurity, Privacy Enterprise Solutions
summary: NASA has awarded the Cybersecurity and Privacy Enterprise Solutions and Services (CyPrESS) contract to Booz Allen Hamilton of McLean, Virginia.

title: NASA Seeks Input on Moon to Mars Objectives, Comments Due May 31
summary: NASA Seeks Input on Moon to Mars Objectives, Comments Due May 31

title: NASA's InSight Still Hunting Marsquakes as Power Levels Diminish
summary: Dusty solar panels and darker skies are expected to bring the Mars lander mission to a close around the end of this year.

title: Mars 2020 continues science in Jezero, Mars Odyssey solves Martian frost mystery
summary: In late April, Perseverance and Ingenuity arrived at the edge of Jezero Crater’s ancient river delta — an area of the crater that was likely once formed by flowing water, and a major focus of the Mars 2020 mission. Perseverance‘s arrival at the delta marked the beginning of the rover’s second science campaign in the crater, officially kicking off on sol 407 of the mission.

title: NASA reveals launch dates for Artemis I through the first half of 2023
summary: NASA administrator declares the SLS rocket will launch this year "in August."
